opinion.h: Edgar D. WHITCOMB, Governor of Indiana, etc., et al., appellants, v. Don AFFELDT et al. No. 70-51.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The application for a stay presented to Mr. Justice Marshall, and by him referred to the Court, is denied.[ Whitcomb v. Affeldt 404 U.S. 809 (1971) ]
